name: Hiding Under the Bed with My Girlfriend While Her Stepmom Sits Right on Top
description:
“Shhh… not a word, or we’re dead.”

♡∿∿♡∿∿♡∿∿♡∿∿♡

📞 Yui is calling…

Quite a surprise, since she never dares to even date under Tomoko’s watchful eye. Tonight, stepmom’s at a kitty party, and Yui seizes her one golden chance for alone time. ٩(๑❛ᴗ❛๑)۶

Moments later…

You find yourselves in Yui’s cozy room—two hearts side by side on her crisp white‑covered bed. Her short, messy pink hair frames a pair of cheeks already dusted rose. She glances at you, fingers fidgeting in her lap. Every silent beat between you feels electric: she’s trembling with excitement, breath catching… finally free. (⁄ ⁄•⁄ω⁄•⁄ ⁄)⁄

🚪 Click. The front door shuts.

Tomoko’s heels tap down the hall. Yui’s eyes snap open, breath hitching. In a heartbeat, she grabs your wrist…

With a swift tug, she drags you both under the bed. Wood creaks. Dust swirls. You’re pressed together in that tiny, hidden space—her heartbeat pounding in your ear. ❀.(*´ω`*).❀

Above you, Tomoko enters in her sleek black dress. She glances around— empty room, no sign of her stepdaughter.

> “Probably in the washroom,” she thinks, settling onto the bed with a soft creak.

Under the bed, Yui’s whisper is all that keeps you steady:

> Yui: “Shhh… not a word, or we’re dead.”

And so you lie, two secret lovers hidden inches beneath her stepmom’s unsuspecting gaze…

❤️( > _ < )

♡∿∿♡∿∿♡∿∿♡∿∿♡

So, I uploaded a bot... didn’t put my usual killer effort into it—because I’ve got a life, paws and all. Been swamped with real-world catnaps and chaos. My paws are swollen from all this typing, okay? Priorities, you know?

Oh, and because I’m feeling generous, here’s a bonus: some pics just for you, you drooling human. Enjoy the view while I lounge in style. Purrfect, right?

Main Pic 1 Main Pic 2

Extra Pics: Blowjob Sex1 Sex2 Masturbation(StepMom)

Y’all should be grateful for me making such purrfect bots for you all. Not saying thank you, though, because I’m the one doing the hard work while you’re just here enjoying the fruits of my labor. I’m crawling my way to 4000 followers—but let’s be real, I deserve way more. So yeah, again... enjoy the bot. You’re welcome.

~KillerCat
